data.body: Investigation complete: bug is invalid. The /dso:end-session invocation already exists in sprint SKILL.md Phase 8 at lines 2185 (success path) and 2217 (graceful shutdown path), wrapped in HARD-GATEs. Git history confirms this has been present since file creation and reinforced 3 times. If behavioral symptom persists, it's positional bias at line 2151+ of a 2200+ line file — not a missing instruction.
